description: A wide (1200x675) holiday greeting card from DHS for Eid al-Adha. The background is a green gradient, lighter at the center and darker at the edges. On the left is a flat silhouette illustration of a mosque archway or window in slightly darker green with a thin orange-gold outline, containing a large pale-green crescent moon; smaller mosque-dome silhouettes with small crescents sit along the bottom. On the upper right, a row of six hanging lanterns in dark-green silhouette hang from the top edge. At center-right, white script reads 'Eid al-Adha' above the spaced-out serif word 'MUBARAK' flanked by two small stars. The bottom-right corner shows the circular blue-and-white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal.
